findings.detail: Imports from marketmind.config.*, marketmind.gateway.async_client, marketmind.pipeline.flash_preprocessor, marketmind.pipeline.verification_chain. Does NOT import from shadows/ or ui/. Clean boundary.

New fields (direction, risk_level, time_window, layer_1-4_narrative, core_logic) all have empty string defaults. app.py accesses .verdict, .confidence (existing fields). HypothesisResult constructed inline with new defaults in priced-in path and cap-reached path. All callers compatible.

If chat_flash fails (exception): logged at error level, result returned with empty narratives. If JSON parse fails: logged at warning level, narratives stay empty. Both non-blocking — investigation continues with heuristic fields (direction, risk_level, time_window) populated.

_extract_direction: returns '' for no asset, no direction, or mixed signals. _estimate_risk_level: all branches covered (低 when conf>0.7+bear<0.3, 高 when conf<0.5 or bear>0.6, else 中等). _estimate_time_window: dict.get(default='N/A') covers all unknown verdicts. No unhandled paths.

HVR refinement loop has multiple termination conditions: (a) max_rounds limit, (b) max_api_calls cap, (c) pro_calls_counter cap, (d) confidence below 0.30 abandon, (e) diminishing returns threshold, (f) confidence >= actionable threshold. No infinite loop risk.

notes: All checks pass. Robust fallback chains throughout. New HypothesisResult fields are backward-compatible via default values. HVR loop has comprehensive termination conditions.
